details.title: About | X29.Ai
details.text:
CONTACT US
X29
AI
X29.AI
PORT CO: CONDUCTING AI
We believe this is the most exciting moment in human history — a time when intelligence is being redefined and companies must be rebuilt.
Our mission is to research, design, and prototype operating models where AI is the foundation, not the add-on.
We
